seoTitle: Bungwahl vs Bunnan — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Bungwahl and Bunnan. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Bungwahl and Bunnan.
heading: Bungwahl vs Bunnan — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Bungwahl, New South Wales and Bunnan, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Bungwahl has a lower overall climate risk score (45/100) compared to Bunnan (46/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Bungwahl or Bunnan safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Bungwahl has a flood risk score of 59/100, while Bunnan scores 55/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Bungwahl scores 60/100 for bushfire risk. Bunnan scores 55/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Bungwahl or Bunnan?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Bungwahl has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.42% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
